history.content: so im running a blog, and i want a team to go ahead and maybe by the hour go ahead and scrape news sites, and gather the top sourced,  and then generate me a few blog posts based on some headlines/news that its gathered

You’re hitting a limitation: web_search needs a Google API key + CX set in Settings → Search, so we can’t actually scrape live news yet.

If you’d like, I can instead:  
1) Design and set up a local “news → draft posts” team using the built‑in team/scheduler tools; and  
2) Show you how to plug in your own news APIs (or a Google key) so it can run automatically every hour.
